description:
The MIDI layer (web/src/midi.ts, web/src/integra.ts) has no:
- Connection state monitoring (port.closed not watched)
- Reconnection logic on disconnect
- Heartbeat/keep-alive detection
- User-visible error feedback on connection loss

Device can disconnect silently leaving the UI in a stale state.

Fix: Monitor MIDIPort onstatechange events. Implement reconnection with
exponential backoff. Surface connection state in the UI (DeviceStatus component).
title: Add MIDI connection monitoring and reconnection
